payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden cabinet showing two recessed-panel doors with a narrow vertical seam at center, visible wood grain and matte finish, small scuffs along the bottom edge, no visible handles; photographed close-up at roughly 1.0 m under low lighting and shown full-height within the crop.
